name: tl;dv Meeting Recording and Intelligence API
what_it_does: tl;dv meeting intelligence REST API for sales teams and remote-first companies to record, transcribe, summarize, and extract insights from Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams meetings with AI-powered coaching and CRM integration. Enables AI agents to manage meeting recording access and retrieval for conversation intelligence automation, handle AI-generated transcript and summary access for meeting documentation automation, access highlight and key moment extraction for insight synthesis automation, retrieve speaker diastization and time-stamped quote for attribution automation, manage CRM note and follow-up sync for sales workflow automation, handle coaching insight and talking time analytics for team performance automation, access meeting search and filtering for conversation repository automation, retrieve team meeting library management for organizational knowledge automation, manage webhook notification for meeting event automation, and integrate tl;dv with Salesforce, HubSpot, Notion, Slack, and productivity tools for end-to-end meeting intelligence workflow.
use_cases: Recording and transcribing customer calls from sales intelligence agents
Extracting meeting highlights from insight synthesis agents
Syncing call notes to CRM from sales workflow automation agents
Analyzing sales coaching from team performance agents
not_for: Enterprise-grade conversation intelligence (use Gong or Chorus for enterprise CI)
Meeting scheduling and calendar management (use Calendly for scheduling)
Webinar recording and replay (use Zoom Webinars or Riverside.fm for webinars)
best_when: A sales team or remote-first company wanting AI agents to automate meeting recording, AI transcription, insight extraction, and CRM note synchronization through tl;dv's meeting intelligence platform.
avoid_when: BOT JOINING LATENCY FOR CRITICAL MEETING CAPTURE: tl;dv recording bot joins meetings via Google Meet or Zoom bot; bot join may take 1-3 minutes after meeting starts; automated meeting capture must account for bot join latency; automated meeting setup with recording bot created at meeting start time may miss opening minutes. MEETING PLATFORM SUPPORT SCOPE: tl;dv supports Google Meet, Zoom, and Microsoft Teams; automated recording for other meeting platforms (Webex, GoToMeeting) is not supported; automated organization-wide meeting recording must verify platform coverage. AI SUMMARY QUALITY FOR TECHNICAL MEETINGS: tl;dv AI summaries and highlights use general NLP models; automated technical meeting summary for specialized domain discussions (financial, medical, legal) may produce generic summaries; automated summary for specialized domains should implement human review before sharing externally.

auth.notes: tl;dv uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. Düsseldorf, Germany HQ. Founded 2020 by Raphael Allstadt, Cark Güven, and Namrata Bhansali. Backed by Cavalry Ventures, Acton Capital ($8M raised). Products: Meeting recording, AI transcription, highlight clipping, CRM sync, coaching analytics. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Notion, Slack, Zapier. GDPR. Serves 200,000+ teams. Competes with Fireflies, Otter.ai, and Fathom for meeting intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan (unlimited recordings, 5 AI summaries/month, basic features)
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro ($18/user/mo, unlimited AI summaries), Business ($59/user/mo, CRM integration), Enterprise (custom); annual discount
pricing.notes: Düsseldorf DE. GDPR-native. Free tier (unlimited recordings, limited AI). Per-user subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; recording and transcript queries throttled; webhooks for recording complete and insight events

known_agent_gotchas: RECORDING PROCESSING ASYNC — WEBHOOK REQUIRED FOR COMPLETION: tl;dv meeting recordings process asynchronously after meeting ends; automated transcript access must poll recording status or use webhook for completion notification; automated immediate transcript access after meeting ends returns processing status rather than completed transcript

RECORDING BOT CONSENT REQUIREMENTS: tl;dv recording bot requires meeting participant consent; automated recording must handle consent notification; automated recording in jurisdictions requiring all-party consent (California, Illinois) without consent mechanism creates legal compliance risk

HIGHLIGHT CLIP vs FULL TRANSCRIPT ACCESS: tl;dv API provides access to AI-generated highlights (key moments) and full transcript separately; automated meeting intelligence pipeline must decide between highlight-only (faster) and full transcript (complete); automated highlight-only processing for detailed analysis misses non-highlighted content

CRM SYNC REQUIRES ACTIVE INTEGRATION CONFIGURATION: tl;dv CRM sync to Salesforce/HubSpot requires active integration configuration in tl;dv settings; automated meeting note sync to CRM depends on active CRM connection; automated CRM sync without active tl;dv-CRM integration creates sync failure without clear connection error

MEETING PLATFORM BOT INVITE vs AUTO-JOIN CONFIGURATION: tl;dv supports both calendar-based auto-join and manual bot invite for recording; automated recording pipeline must configure appropriate join method for meeting type; automated manual bot invite for calendar-based meetings creates duplicate recording attempts
agent_readiness.security_notes: Meeting intelligence. GDPR. API key. EU. Meeting recording, transcript, and conversation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Meeting intelligence. GDPR. API key. EU. Meeting and conversation data.
